message:
fix(security): replace timing-vulnerable comparisons with ct_eq and fix fail-open expiry boundary

- verifier_sdk.rs: trust anchor comparison in verify_trust_state() used == instead of ct_eq (timing attack)
- migration_artifact.rs: HMAC signature comparisons in verify_artifact_signatures() used ==/!= instead of ct_eq
- migration_pipeline.rs: receipt signature comparison in verify_receipt_signature() used == instead of ct_eq
- audience_token.rs: service identity comparison in audience_contains() used == instead of ct_eq
- compat_gates.rs: freshness check used <= (fail-open at boundary) instead of < (fail-closed)
- Added regression tests for timing-safe near-match rejection in verifier_sdk and migration_artifact

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
